meta.title: Luma Works - Interactive Case Study
meta.description: A two-page cinematic studio site generated with cinematic-site-builder.

copy.title: Digital stories with real-time depth
copy.body: Luma Works designs cinematic web systems where copy, motion, and WebGL share one progress model.

copy.title: A fixed stage for changing narratives
copy.body: Scene presets provide the visual floor while Codex adapts content, pacing, and interaction.

copy.title: Explore the launch system
copy.body: The second page uses the same runtime and validation contract with different chapter timing.

copy.title: A product reveal that moves like a film
copy.body: The case page starts with a spatial field and carries the same design language into proof and conversion.

copy.title: Content remains semantic while visuals stay live
copy.body: The DOM layer stays readable and indexable, while WebGL responds to phase, pointer, and device budgets.

copy.title: A validated cinematic delivery path
copy.body: Build smoke, config validation, fallback checks, and visual smoke are built into the generated project.
